title: Bitcoin -> Ergo bounded-parser proof vector (v1)
description: Schema for the *.proof.json integration vectors under test-vectors/. Strict on the consensus-relevant fields (contract, registers, context var 1); permissive on the informational bitcoin.* / selected_output / notes metadata, which is documentation only and may be intentionally stale in mutation-derived vectors.

contract.description: Which ErgoScript contract's semantics this vector exercises.

registers.description: Consensus input: the Ergo box registers the contract reads.

R4.description: Expected Bitcoin txid in NATURAL double-SHA256 byte order (32 bytes).

R5.description: SHA-256 of the target output's scriptPubKey (32 bytes).

R6.description: Minimum output value in satoshis (present for btc_verify_parser_amount).

1.description: Non-witness (stripped) transaction serialization as even-length lowercase hex.

bitcoin.description: Informational, human-oriented decode of the transaction. Documentation only, not consensus input.

selected_output.description: Informational record of the output the vector targets. Documentation only.

expected.description: Informational expected verdict for the vector.

reason.description: Informational human-readable note about why the vector is valid/invalid.
